reviews.comment:
Mala atención. Indican una vez que paras que hay que parar en el surtidor que esta del lado de la boca del auto...no habia ningun cartel que indicaba eso.
Quise oagar con código QR y no supieron manejar correctamente la aplicacion...

(Translated by Google)
Poor service. They told me to stop at the pump on the side of the car after I pulled over... there was no sign indicating that.
I tried to pay with a QR code and they didn't know how to use the app correctly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURLNTVLdkZBEAE

reviews.comment:
Me tocó adelante alguien que escaneaba algo en el parabrisa....no sé ...tardó una eternidad. 2 plateros. Me cambié de surtidor por la tardanza, y me puse en un surtidor del lado que no tenía el agujero de carga. ME FUI SIN CARGAR, después de haber estado 20 minutos esperando.

(Translated by Google)
Someone was in front of me scanning something on the windshield... I don't know... it took forever. Two silversmiths. I changed pumps because of the delay, and stopped at a pump on the side that didn't have the charging hole. I LEFT WITHOUT CHARGING, after waiting 20 minutes.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNLODZLMjVBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Mala la atención, no trabajaban con tarjeta visa siendo que la lanciudad estaba repleta de turistas no me querían dar una boleta. Mala atención.

(Translated by Google)
The service was terrible; they didn't accept Visa even though the city was packed with tourists, and they refused to give me a receipt. Poor service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNLeGZuSGJREAE
